name: Squash Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice squash into 1/2-inch-thick pieces; sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Saute squash in butter in a skillet over medium heat until tender; drain excess fat.
3. Add sausage to skillet; cook until browned, stirring until crumbly.
4. Add spaghetti sauce to meat mixture; simmer until thickened, about 10 minutes.
5. Layer half the vegetables and meat sauce with Jack cheese and cottage cheese in a 12x7-inch baking dish.
6. Repeat layering with Parmesan cheese and bread crumbs mixed with melted butter.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30 to 35 minutes, or until bubbly.
